pi_items.source: verifier.py and export_result.sh check for total_cycles >= 10 and row_count >= 10 respectively.
export_result.sh explicitly looks for the CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/cycle_timing.csv.
export_result.sh explicitly looks for the JSON file at /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/timing_report.json.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the 'pickAndPlaceDemo.ttt' simulation scene provided with CoppeliaSim. It requires the agent to run the simulation and instrument it to record the cycle time of an automated assembly cell, running for a minimum of 10 cycles. The resulting data must be exported to a CSV file at '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/cycle_timing.csv' and an aggregated JSON report at '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/timing_report.json'.
